name: Oriental Flavored Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: Hot chinese chili paste - quarter teaspoon
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim ends off cucumber and cut into 1 inch chunks.
2. Combine rice vinegar with soy sauce, vegetable oil, sesame oil, salt, sugar, hot chili paste, and garlic.
3. Mix dressing with cucumbers and serve at room temperature.
